summary: Good audience recording with minimal crowd noise captures a solid Atlanta ’90 show highlighted by the rare “Death Don't Have No Mercy.”
review: The tape is an audience (AUD) source that benefits from a center‑mic mix, giving it surprisingly low crowd noise and good dynamic range for a large indoor arena. The performance is described as solid throughout both sets, with the second set’s surprise inclusion of “Death Don't Have No Mercy” providing a vintage Dead vibe. Overall the show and its capture are well‑regarded, earning a four‑star rating from the reviewer.

ai_rating.rationale: Single positive review (4 ★) praises both the musical performance and the audience recording quality, leading to a solid combined rating.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Minimal crowd noise, decent dynamic range, center‑mic mix captures arena ambience nicely; no major flaws noted.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Both sets described as solid; the second set stands out thanks to the rare inclusion of “Death Don't Have No Mercy,” giving it a vintage Fillmore vibe.
